title: AppleCore Unofficial 1.7.10
description: An API for modifying the food and hunger mechanics of Minecraft
body:
An API for modifying the food and hunger mechanics of Minecraft, forked and maintained by the authors of the GregTech New Horizons Modpack.

 
* Allows for easy creation of edible (food) items in other mods
* Adds more Events to interact with food/crops
* Migrated ASM to Mixins

 

Thanks to squeek502 for the original version of AppleCore for 1.7.10!
